citations.desc: Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control.
citations.narrative:
The outdoor part of the sheltered enclosures hasn't been sanitized in months. The licensee wasn't sure when he last
sanitized the outdoor part of the enclosures. The outdoor walls had grime/dirt built up around the doggy doors. The
watering source for the dogs has never been sanitized. Not sanitizing the enclosures and watering source on a biweekly
basis allows for fecal material and grime to build up which can contribute to the spread of disease. The licensee must
sanitize the enclosures and watering source every two weeks to prevent the accumulation of dirt, debris, excreta, and
other disease hazards. Correct by 3/4/26.

Seven adult dogs are not current on their distemper or parvo shots. Not vaccinating all adult dogs against distemper and
parvo doesn't ensure those dogs are adequately protected against those diseases. All adult dogs must be current on their
vaccination against distemper and parvo. Correct by 3/25/26.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
End of report.
Additional Inspectors:
KELLY MAXWELL n

narrative:
3.11(b)(2) 
   
Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control. 
The outdoor part of the sheltered enclosures hasn't been sanitized in months. The licensee wasn't sure when he last 
sanitized the outdoor part of the enclosures. The outdoor walls had grime/dirt built up around the doggy doors. The 
watering source for the dogs has never been sanitized. Not sanitizing the enclosures and watering source on a biweekly 
basis allows for fecal material and grime to build up which can contribute to the spread of disease. The licensee must 
sanitize the enclosures and watering source every two weeks to prevent the accumulation of dirt, debris, excreta, and 
other disease hazards. Correct by 3/4/26. 
3.13(a)(3) 
   
Veterinary care for dogs. 
Seven adult dogs are not current on their distemper or parvo shots. Not vaccinating all adult dogs against distemper and 
parvo doesn't ensure those dogs are adequately protected against those diseases. All adult dogs must be current on their 
vaccination against distemper and parvo. Correct by 3/25/26. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee. 
 
End of report.
